title: tengine.shadergen.multiverse v1
description: Multiverse composite-mode change. Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SHADERGEN_MULTIVERSE in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. Emitted whenever the silo flips between single-universe and grid-composite rendering, so consumers can re-scale visualisations.

sub.description: multiverse subsystem identifier the change applies to

composite_mode.description: name of the composite mode now in effect (e.g. 'grid', 'single', 'overlay')

rows.description: number of rows in the composite grid

cols.description: number of columns in the composite grid
